description: A dark designed graphic with a black-and-white background showing handcuffs, cash, a small bag of pills and what appears to be a firearm on a surface, overlaid with a faint Department of Homeland Security seal. Large white text reads 'CASE CLOSED' with a red underline, and an ICE logo is at the lower right.
notable_text: CASE CLOSED; ICE; DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY
